Package com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel

Class Summary
RSSChannel Model for a RSSChannel
RSSChannelImage Model for a RSSChannelImage.
RSSEnclosure Model for a RSSEnclosure.
RSSNewsItem Model for a RSSNewsItem.
RSSSearchPatternParser Class for parsing the search pattern (Operators: AND, OR, NOT).
RSSXMLFactory This class initializes the parser with a InputStream from the RSSUrl
RSSXMLParser Class to Parse a RSS XML.
 

Exception Summary
RSSXMLFactoryException Custom exception that occurs if there was an error while parsing a RSS XML and creating the RSSChannel
